data.name: MY WIFE SERVES THE KING
data.detailed_description:
You are a brave warrior who has fought many battles.

Your wife is an elf, beautiful and unattainable, now serving the king.

The days that once belonged to you now belong to the throne. She spends more time with him than with you, and her eyes are increasingly fixed on where the fate of the kingdom is decided. You must make a choice: accept her new role and become a cuckold, or risk everything to win back her heart.

💎 What awaits you in the game:

🎵 Atmospheric music.

📖 A sensual storyline where decisions have consequences.

🌿 Multiple storylines.

🎨 Picturesque CG scenes.

Every decision can cost a life.

Every touch is a test.

Accept or fight?

Risk everything or lose everything?

And it's up to you whether love remains...

Or burns forever in the fire of war.

data.short_description: MY WIFE SERVES THE KING is a visual novel set in a world of intrigue and passion. Your wife serves the king, and only you can decide whether to accept this or fight for her love.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1600 MB 可用空間
